title: Visiting Finland in 2027? Here’s How the New Tourist Tax Could Affect Your Travel Costs and Itinerary Planning - Travel And Tour World
summary_full: Visiting Finland in 2027? Here’s How the New Tourist Tax Could Affect Your Travel Costs and Itinerary Planning  Travel And Tour WorldTourists could get slapped with fees as pricey getaway looks to cash in even more  Fox NewsAnother European Hotspot Mulls Tourist Tax  Fodors Travel GuideFinland Joins Italy, Spain, France and Other European Nations in Adopting Tourist Taxes to Help Tackle the Impact of Rising Visitor Numbers, Fund Sustainable Development and Improve Public Services for Locals and Tourists  Travel And Tour WorldCanadians could soon pay more to visit the happiest country in the world  Daily Hive
